name: playbook
description: Vasudev's hub of Claude Code skills, plugins, guides, and workflows.

plugins.name: publish-research
plugins.description: Publish a local research folder (with report.html) to your own GitHub Pages site. Auto-generates a landing index and per-session pages.

plugins.name: design-research-kit
plugins.description: One-command install of the full design research workflow: Lazyweb research skills + publish-research + auto-setup of your GitHub Pages site.

plugins.name: lazyweb
plugins.description: Lazyweb design research skills (not mine — bundled here for one-command install convenience, sourced directly from aboul3ata/lazyweb-skill).
